ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offenses" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense type */,
  "offense_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense */,
  "offense_description" TEXT /* Description of the offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prison_terms" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prison term */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the offenses table */,
  "prison_years" INTEGER /* Number of years served in prison */,
  "prison_months" INTEGER /* Number of months served in prison */,
  "imprisonment_date" TEXT /* Date of imprisonment */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release from prison */,
  "parole_eligibility_date" TEXT /* Date of parole eligibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prison_terms_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offenses ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of arrest */,
  "arrest_offense" TEXT /* Offense leading to the arrest */,
  "arrest_disposition" TEXT /* Disposition of the arrest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rehabilitation_programs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rehabilitation program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the rehabilitation program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the rehabilitation program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_attendances" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the rehabilitation_programs table */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "program_completion_status" TEXT /* Status of program completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_attendances_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES rehabilitation_programs ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "percent_days_employed" REAL /* Percentage of days employed since release */,
  "jobs_per_year" INTEGER /* Number of jobs held per year since release */,
  "employment_exempt" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is exempt from employment requirements */,
  "recidivism_within_3years" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual was recidivist within 3 years of release */,
  "current_job_title" TEXT /* Current job title of the individual */,
  "current_employer" TEXT /* Current employer of the individual */,
  "current_job_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date of the violation */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of violation */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the individual */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Status of treatment for the medical condition */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication prescribed for the medical condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mental health record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "mental_health_condition" TEXT /* Mental health condition of the individual */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Status of treatment for the mental health condition */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication prescribed for the mental health condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "highest_education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the individual */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study for the highest level of education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the individuals table */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "contact_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the contact to the individual */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
